message:
fix(version): sync embedded VERSION in ru script to 1.1.0

The ru script has an embedded VERSION fallback for standalone installations
where the VERSION file isn't present. This must match the VERSION file.

Previously: VERSION="1.0.1"
Now:       VERSION="1.1.0"

CI check "Version Consistency" validates this match.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -120,7 +120,7 @@ fi
 #==============================================================================
 
 # Version: read from VERSION file, fallback to embedded
-VERSION="1.0.1"
+VERSION="1.1.0"
 SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
 if [[ -f "$SCRIPT_DIR/VERSION" ]]; then
     VERSION="$(cat "$SCRIPT_DIR/VERSION")"
